ft_results.question: Quais sao os requisitos para criar image hardened para compliance no ambiente da EnergyGrid Monitor (serverless-transformation)? [context: shape=VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex, 16OCPUs, 200GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#117]
ft_results.response:
Implementacao via OCI CLI para custom-image - EnergyGrid Monitor - serverless-transformation:

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci compute image create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='shared-services'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "custom-image-shared-services-116" \
  --region ap-tokyo-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci compute image list \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='shared-services'].id | [0]") \
  --query "data[?display-name=='custom-image-shared-services-116'].id | [0]"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci compute image update \
  --image-id <resource-ocid> \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "EnergyGrid Monitor - serverless-transformation"}}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci compute image get \
  --image-id <resource-ocid> \
  --query "data.{name,display-name,duration}" \
  --format "json"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci compute image delete \
  --image-id <resource-ocid> \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `shared-services`
- Region: `ap-tokyo-1`
- Shape: `VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex`
- OCPUs: `16`
- Storage: `200 GB`

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Concepts/computeoverview.htm

#!/bin/bash
